'''sadugu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:oasification|oasification]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-d-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oasification|oasification]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| sadugu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:sædigith|sædigith]] || [[word:sædigij|sædigij]] || [[word:sædigish|sædigish]] || [[word:sædigi|sædigi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:saduduguth|saduduguth]] || [[word:saduduguj|saduduguj]] || [[word:sadudugush|sadudugush]] || [[word:sadudugu|sadudugu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:saduguth|saduguth]] || [[word:saduguj|saduguj]] || [[word:sadugush|sadugush]] || [[word:sadugu|sadugu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:sadufgufth|sadufgufth]] || [[word:sadufgufj|sadufgufj]] || [[word:sadufgufsh|sadufgufsh]] || [[word:sadufguf|sadufguf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:saduguthu|saduguthu]] || [[word:saduguju|saduguju]] || [[word:sadugushu|sadugushu]] || [[word:saduguku|saduguku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:saduguth|saduguth]] || [[word:saduguj|saduguj]] || [[word:sadugush|sadugush]] || [[word:sadugu|sadugu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:saduguthul|saduguthul]] || [[word:sadugujul|sadugujul]] || [[word:sadugushul|sadugushul]] || [[word:sadugukul|sadugukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:saduguuthuthu|saduguuthuthu]] || [[word:saduguujuju|saduguujuju]] || [[word:saduguushushu|saduguushushu]] || [[word:saduguuku|saduguuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:saduguthun|saduguthun]] || [[word:sadugujun|sadugujun]] || [[word:sadugushun|sadugushun]] || [[word:sadugukun|sadugukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:saduguthuoro|saduguthuoro]] || [[word:sadugujuoro|sadugujuoro]] || [[word:sadugushuoro|sadugushuoro]] || [[word:sadugukuoro|sadugukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5551a29}}
